children.heading: Former United States Tariff Commission
children.label: a Former United States Tariff Commission
children.text: The United States Tariff Commission (established by ) is renamed as the United States International Trade Commission.section 1330 of this title

children.heading: References in law and other documents
children.label: b References in law and other documents
children.text: Any reference in any law of the United States, or in any order, rule, regulation, or other document, to the United States Tariff Commission (or the Tariff Commission) shall be considered to refer to the United States International Trade Commission.
